column2: Assessor Reviews Swarm-Aware SORA Evidence and Sets Defensible SA/GR Requirements
column3: ['The assessor logs into the UAS operational authorization application. ', 'The assessor reviews the provided swarm-aware SORA evidence for operations with specific air and ground risks. ', 'Based on the reviewed swarm-aware SORA evidence, the assessor sets SA/GR requirements. ', 'The assessor verifies that the SA/GR requirements are defensible. ']
column4: ['The assessor is able to access the UAS operational authorization application. ', 'The assessor has reviewed all relevant information in the swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'The assessor has set SA/GR requirements based on the provided swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'The assessor confirms that the SA/GR requirements have been set defensibly, taking into account all relevant information in the swarm-aware SORA evidence and any applicable regulations or guidelines. ']
